experience.summary: Building and maintaining dis-wagtail, a Django/Wagtail CMS serving ONS publishers. Working across Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, Redis and Kafka on a distributed platform team.

Worked on the development of dis-wagtail, a Django/Wagtail CMS serving ONS publishers. Contributed to the design and implementation of new features, as well as maintaining and improving existing functionality.
Developed and maintained web applications using Python and Django. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions for academic research projects.
Assisted in the development of web applications and provided support for existing software. Gained experience in Python, Django, and frontend technologies while working on various client projects.

projects.title: IMAX Sentinel
projects.description: A BFI IMAX screening watcher that monitors Christopher Nolan film listings and sends Telegram alerts when tickets appear. Uses Camoufox to bypass Cloudflare detection.

projects.title: Newsletter Sentinel
projects.description: A personal pipeline that fetches newsletters from Gmail, deduplicates stories using Jaccard similarity, and generates AI-powered daily digests via Claude.

projects.title: Portfolio & Blog
projects.description: This site — a static portfolio and blog built with Pelican, Jinja2 and Tailwind CSS. Deployed to Netlify with GitHub Actions CI.
